presale_conversion_rate.rationale: Issue 1 (Review Plan) states a 2% conversion would yield 600 units versus the 1,500-unit assumption; expert benchmark suggests aiming for at least 5%. Range brackets prepper-skeptical D2C hardware launches.

addressable_prepper_buyers.rationale: Source-stated European active prepper market is 15,000-20,000 buyers; base midpoint, low halved to reflect Issue 3 skepticism about EMF-product trust, high marginally above the upper bound.

wholesale_discount_fraction.rationale: Data Collection section 4 notes retailers like SurvivalAid.de demand 40-50% off retail with net-60/90 terms. Range brackets standard European prepper-retailer wholesale norms.

premium_unit_price_eur.rationale: Plan commits EUR 149 premium tier. Review Plan flags EUR 80-120 sweet spot for preppers; low side reflects potential price compression toward EUR 110 if EUR 149 loses 60% of market, high capped near commitment.

unit_bom_cost_eur.rationale: Premortem states laptop-combo BOM is EUR 75. Risk 6 and Data Collection 2 note copper-beryllium gasket cost +12% with diversified supply and possible material escalation; high side allows for BOM inflation.

retailer_committed_units.rationale: SurvivalAid.de white-label volume is stated as 1,000 units guaranteed but Risk 10 and Expert Criticism flag it as unsigned; modelled as gate-dependent (binary signed/unsigned).
